Current Employment Opportunities
Careers
Back to Health Wellness Centre is seeking part-time and full-time Registered Massage Therapists (RMTs) to join our growing team of healthcare professionals.

About you:

You:

Are registered and in good standing with the College of Massage Therapists of Ontario (CMTO);
Have professional liability insurance;
Have excellent clinical and communication skills;
Are familiar with treating sports-related and common soft tissue injuries and conditions;
Can provide a variety of massage therapy techniques; and
Are comfortable with an electronic online schedule and patient case notes.

We are seeking caring and compassionate RM
